title: leptalix nigra
side_effects: Leptalix nigra can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe nausea, dizziness, and stomach cramps. Long-term misuse can lead to more serious complications, including kidney damage, respiratory failure, and even coma in extreme cases. Additionally, improper use may also cause allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and swelling, particularly in individuals with pre-existing conditions. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the leptalix nigra plant for any health-related purposes.
